categories.label: Glory from Battles Won
categories.description: Glory earned each time you win a pillage battle (amount equals your Axes stat at time of victory)

categories.label: Glory from Quests
categories.description: Glory earned from completed quest cards revealed during the Quest phase of each Age

categories.label: Glory from Pillage Rewards
categories.description: Glory earned from flipped pillage tokens when you win a pillage (some tokens grant glory directly)

categories.label: Glory from Card Effects
categories.description: Glory earned from special card abilities, Loki effects, and upgrade card triggers throughout the game

categories.label: Clan Stat Bonuses
categories.description: Glory earned from clan stat track bonuses and milestone rewards on the Rage, Axes, and Horns tracks
